$description: Provider-agnostic reference fixtures for Jotty task extraction. Loaded by the XCTest target (Phase 3, Apple FM) and re-used by Phase 4 (Ollama / Claude / OpenAI / Gemini). Each sample is fully self-contained: input text, the `now` anchor, the timezone, and the expected structural output. Comparators on structured fields are STRICT (dueDate, timeBlock, calendarBlock, task count). Comparator on `title` is FUZZY (substring containment, normalized whitespace, normalized case) to tolerate cross-provider phrasing variance while still policing fidelity.

$comparator_rules.title: lowercased and whitespace-normalized expected.title MUST be a substring of lowercased and whitespace-normalized actual.title; actual.title MUST also be <= 1.5x the length of expected.title (catches paraphrase drift).
$comparator_rules.dueDate: if expected.dueDate is null, actual.dueDate MUST be null. If expected.dueDate is set, actual.dueDate MUST equal it as 'yyyy-MM-dd' in the sample timezone.
$comparator_rules.timeBlock: if expected.timeBlock is null, actual.timeBlock MUST be null. If set, actual.timeBlock.start and .end MUST equal the ISO-8601 instants in the sample timezone.
$comparator_rules.calendarBlock: MUST equal expected.calendarBlock exactly (the calendarBlock = (timeBlock != nil) rule is encoded into expected, so a mismatch is a mapper bug).
$comparator_rules.task_count: actual.tasks.count MUST equal expected.tasks.length exactly. Over-extraction is the #1 hallucination failure mode; under-extraction is also a fail because it loses user intent.
$comparator_rules.note_body: actual.note_body MUST contain expected.note_body as a substring (whitespace-normalized). The capture-non-lossy invariant: every non-task line of input flows into the note body.

$failure_mode_legend.wellness_hallucination: Venting / emotional / observational prose must yield zero tasks.
$failure_mode_legend.past_tense_fabrication: Past-tense reports must yield zero tasks.
$failure_mode_legend.soon_hallucinated_date: Vague urgency words must NOT resolve to a specific date.
$failure_mode_legend.timezone_naive_tomorrow: 'tomorrow' / 'today' must resolve in the user's timezone, not UTC.
$failure_mode_legend.duration_vs_timeblock: Durations ('1-2 hours of focus') must NOT become timeBlocks.
$failure_mode_legend.lost_modifier: Modifying clauses must be preserved in title; truncation is a fail.
$failure_mode_legend.run_on_split_failure: Punctuation-light run-ons must split into multiple tasks on intent boundaries.
$failure_mode_legend.confident_wrong_weekday: Same-day weekday name resolves to next occurrence (today + 7), never today.
$failure_mode_legend.calendar_block_default: calendarBlock = (timeBlock != nil); a single named clock time ('remind me at 5pm') IS a 30-minute calendar block, while a vague mention ('around 3') is not.
$failure_mode_legend.note_preservation: Surrounding prose flows into note body alongside extracted tasks.
$failure_mode_legend.happy_path: Canonical correct extraction; baseline that the system works at all.
